detailed_paragraph:
Date on Deals + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Date on Deals with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Date on Deals?

Date on Deals could refer to a platform or service that offers deals, discounts, or promotions to consumers. It may focus on providing offers for specific products, services, or experiences to help consumers save money.

Why Date on Deals + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Date on Deals, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Date on Deals through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Date on Deals.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Date on Deals, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Date on Deals + Synup?

The Date on Deals integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Date on Deals integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Date on Deals logo to manage the Synup + Date on Deals integration and associated settings.
